title: Veterinary Nurse (Central) - Shift #HHW
description:
Key Responsibilities:


Anaesthesia & Patient Care

  • Perform general anaesthesia for companion animals, including exotic species (birds, rabbits, etc.).
  • Assess animals pre-operatively by reviewing medical history and evaluating health status for anaesthesia suitability.
  • Prepare and calculate accurate doses of anaesthetic drugs under veterinarian instructions.
  • Assist in induction, maintenance, and recovery of animals under anaesthesia.
  • Monitor vital signs during anaesthesia using multiparameter monitors and report abnormalities.
  • Implement corrective measures as directed by veterinarians to ensure patient safety.
  • Ensure smooth post-anaesthesia recovery, administer prescribed pain relief, and provide comfort to animals.
  • Place catheters and prepare patients for anaesthesia while performing routine nursing duties.

Equipment Management

  • Set up, maintain, and perform regular checks of anaesthesia equipment, ensuring proper functionality and safety.
  • Report any malfunctions or repairs needed for anaesthesia machines and associated equipment.
  • Administrative Duties
  • Maintain accurate records of drug administration, inventory, and patient medical records.
  • Ensure controlled drugs and inventory are properly managed.

Collaboration & Training

  • Work closely with veterinary surgeons, nurses, and patient care assistants to ensure smooth workflow.
  • Participate in case discussions, team meetings, surgical rounds, and training sessions.
  • Provide guidance and mentorship to junior staff on anaesthesia protocols and procedures.


Key Requirements:

  • Min Diploma in veterinary technology/nursing.
  • Experience in a GP veterinary clinic/hospital would be advantageous.


Interested candidates please send your resume to wendykhoo@recruitexpress.com.sg


Wendy Khoo Hui Wen - R1761665


Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA License No: 99C4599
